subject: Write AI cost analysis
description:
Spec requires:
- Total LLM API spend for code gen and content creation
- Token usage breakdown (input vs output per provider)
- Production cost projection table: 100 / 1K / 10K / 100K users across hosting, DB, AI content gen, analytics, image storage
- Assumptions: campaigns per user, page views per session, AI gen frequency

Write to `docs/ai-cost-analysis.md`. Pull Claude Code spend from billing or session logs.
